title: API Sandbox for testing user permissions
excerpt:
We’re building a search tool that allows our customers to search for Monday.com Workspaces and Boards, as well as results from other software tools all in one place. 
I was hoping to learn if there is a Monday.com sandbo…

posts.author: SergeantSearch (Julio Buendia)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re building a search tool that allows our customers to search for Monday.com Workspaces and Boards, as well as results from other software tools all in one place.

I was hoping to learn if there is a Monday.com sandbox environment that allows us to test user-level permissions. The only information I had seen was on this discussion.

Is there a way for us to test user-level permissions without an enterprise account?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @SergeantSearch and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

What do you want to test exactly? How each type of user (member, guest, viewer) sees and interacts with apps? Permissions set from the admin section of an admin in an account?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: SergeantSearch (Julio Buendia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the warm welcome Matias!

Basically, we’d like to test how each type of user sees and interacts with Monday.com Workspaces and Boards from our app, with the ability to test all possible permissions features/cases

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @SergeantSearch!

Regarding the different user types (member, guest, viewer, admin) you could create a developer account here and then just create one user of each type and test that.

Does that help?

Cheers,
Matias
